rationale: Consolidate mongodb:mongo — avg-doc-size-bytes observed 150 bytes is under value < 2,048 bytes (independent: https://dev.to/franckpachot/postgresql-jsonb-size-limits-to-prevent-toast-slicing-9e8). Evidence: app/documents.py:12. 2 call sites across 1 file to rewrite; data migration: copy; rollback: Keep the source document store read-only for one release cycle; restore from its native export/backup if the JSONB cutover surfaces data issues.

migrationEffort.rollbackNote: Keep the source document store read-only for one release cycle; restore from its native export/backup if the JSONB cutover surfaces data issues.

thresholdComparisons.threshold: value < 5,000,000 vectors | 5,000,000 <= value < 50,000,000 vectors | value >= 100,000,000 vectors

rationale: Borderline for pinecone:default — no static signal resolves count-vectors for this repo; defaulting to pgvector (HNSW index) pending a corpus/usage estimate or `postgres-advisor analyze --live`. Evidence: app/vectors.py:14.

thresholdComparisons.threshold: value < 1,000 msgs/sec | 1,000 <= value < 10,000 msgs/sec | value >= 10,000 msgs/sec

rationale: Consolidate redis:redis — est-peak-msgs-sec observed 1.6-160 msgs/sec is under value < 1,000 msgs/sec | 1,000 <= value < 10,000 msgs/sec | value >= 10,000 msgs/sec (independent: https://medium.com/@the_atomic_architect/postgresql-replaced-my-message-queue-and-taught-me-skip-locked-along-the-way-87d59e5b9525). Evidence: requirements.txt:5. 1 call site across 3 files to rewrite; data migration: dual-write; rollback: Same dual-write cutover as pgmq: drain the old broker before retiring it, revert by re-pointing producers if needed.
postgresEquivalent: Plain SQL, FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

migrationEffort.rollbackNote: Same dual-write cutover as pgmq: drain the old broker before retiring it, revert by re-pointing producers if needed.
